response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at Naver), but the role requires a CTO with 5+ years of senior technical leadership, demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems at scale, and a track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+. The resume shows no people-management experience, no fintech infrastructure background (credit, payments, embedded finance), and no evidence of operating AI systems in regulated environments. The gap between a Senior/Staff IC profile and an executive CTO role at a venture-backed fintech scale-up is too wide.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, backend, distributed systems, and embedded
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing advocacy)
concerns: No demonstrated engineering leadership or people management experience at any scale
No fintech, credit-risk, or regulated-environment production experience
No evidence of production multi-agent AI systems, LLM evaluation pipelines, or agentic frameworks like LangGraph

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
